title: MEDIUM: streaming read scope not enforced
description: In src/streaming.rs, the authenticate() function (lines 46-80) validates the bearer token exists and is not revoked, but neither streaming_sse_handler nor streaming_ws calls require_scope('read') after authentication. A write-only token can subscribe to all streaming channels and read the full public timeline, user notifications, and direct messages. Fix: add auth.require_scope('read')? after the authenticate() call in both handlers.
